summary_en: 22,600 shares acquired for ¥82.9M (0.11% of shares outstanding) in May 15–31, 2026, via open-market purchase on TSE. Cumulative progress under ¥1,000M authorization with 280,000 share limit (1.38% of S/O) through November 11, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Status of Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Denyo Co., Ltd. filed a progress report on June 1, 2026, disclosing the acquisition of 22,600 treasury shares for a total of ¥82,884,000 (approximately ¥3,664 per share) through open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange during May 15–31, 2026. This acquisition is conducted under authorization granted by the Board of Directors on May 14, 2026, which sets an upper limit of 280,000 shares (1.38% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) and ¥1,000 million in total acquisition cost, with an execution window extending through November 11, 2026. The 22,600 shares acquired to date represent 0.11% of shares outstanding and consume approximately 8.3% of the authorized yen budget and 8.1% of the authorized share count.
